---
title: "Climate Change, decent work, and workers health Worker vulnerabilities and response in Brazilian agriculture"
subtitle: "Report for consolidated research project, including main results and final recommendation"
draft: true
draft-mode: visible
date: "2026-02-28"
date-modified: "2026-02-28"
image: img/cover-en.png
execute:
  echo: false
citation:
  url: in progress
lang: en  
categories:
  - Workers Health
  - Climate change
  - Human Rights
  - Decent Work
  
---

[add a brief explaination]

This report is the concluding output of a joint research project carried out by the Rights Lab at the University of Nottingham (UK), Universidade Federal Fluminense (UFF), Universidade Federal do Maranhão (UFMA), and Universidade Federal do Mato Grosso (UFMT). The research was funded by the British Academy’s ODA Challenge-Oriented Research Grants 2024 Programme (IOCRG:100945), supported under the UK Government’s International Science Partnerships Fund.


<img
  src="img/cover-en.png"
  style="width:100%; height:auto;"
  loading="lazy"
/>


### Download {.appendix}

{{< downloadthis img/clidewo_report.pdf dname=CLIDEWO-Climate-DecentWork-Health label="Download the pdf" icon=file-earmark-pdf type=Warning >}}


#### Share it on social media:

```{=html}
<!-- AddToAny BEGIN -->
<div class="a2a_kit a2a_kit_size_32 a2a_default_style" data-a2a-icon-color="#FFDC02,black">

<a class="a2a_button_email a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_copy_link a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_linkedin a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_facebook a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_bluesky a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_x a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_threads a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_mastodon a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_whatsapp a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_dd a2a_counter" href="https://www.addtoany.com/share"></a>
</div>
<script async src="https://static.addtoany.com/menu/page.js"></script>
<!-- AddToAny END -->
```
